title: sum sup (2)

        - you're mourning a fantasy
ignoring your history
life is more than a plan to me
i'm exploring the mystery of being a planted seed
i don't need to scan stands of trees to inherit my anscestry
i don't need to stare at death to see life in front of me
i got energy left in me, it's too soon for destiny
i'm trying to step into a room so dark you can't bring the right weapon to
no room to park
can't quite bring yourself to head into whatever's ahead of you
so you circle the block like a cop trying to get his due
slow down though, that slope is too wet for you
and it ends in a cess pool
i don't know what's next but here's something else to do
    - ))}}
        - let it go
let it flow
bring a rope
ya never know
find the test
see the opp
look but don't stop
guess
make a mess
watch it grow like a living mass
thank god each moment passed
next time you find yourself sitting mass
be boulder
roll over
give it gas when engaged, don't just rev the motor
good years, hit the road, get tired, pull over
take time to rest until you know when it's over
then go for broke like a stock trader when his life's over
die sober
dice over everything so throw for anything
cuz nothing mean's anything when you don't hope for something
that's something ya tend to see when we cope with tendencies
close but pretend to be close cuz you're frenemies
openin your borders but in close quarters it's them and me
    - ))}}
        - it's funny you think you're wisdom could solve my problems
started laughing when i looked at it
wanna know what i saw then
wisdom is dumb
the words won't come along when we call them
if um i um try um my um life uh might uh light up
um um um um um um up sum sum sum sum some
ih ih sup beh didda beh beh bi dudda buh
